apiKey.aria.description: aria-label for the key input (provider = provider name)

apiKey.clearTitle.defaultMessage: Remove the saved key from this browser

apiKey.confirmClear.defaultMessage: Remove the saved API key from this browser?

apiKey.confirmSave.defaultMessage: Save this API key in your browser? It will persist on this device until you clear it.

apiKey.infoTip.defaultMessage: Your key for this provider. Kept in memory for this session only — click the save icon to store it in this browser.

apiKey.placeholder.defaultMessage: API key — not saved unless you save it

apiKey.saveUpdateTitle.defaultMessage: Update the saved key in this browser

app.deleteAction.description: Accept-button label on the delete-image confirm dialog

app.deleteConfirm.defaultMessage: Delete this image and its metadata from disk? This can't be undone.
app.deleteConfirm.description: Confirm dialog before deleting an image from disk

app.deleteManyConfirm.defaultMessage: Delete {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} and their metadata from disk? This can't be undone.
app.deleteManyConfirm.description: Confirm dialog before mass-deleting selected images from disk

app.deleteManyFailed.defaultMessage: {count, plural, one {# image} other {# images}} couldn't be deleted and are still there.
app.deleteManyFailed.description: Alert shown when some images in a mass delete fail to delete

app.feature.gallery.description: Noun phrase for the gallery, used in the online-locked tooltip

app.feature.single.description: Noun phrase for the single view, used in the online-locked tooltip

app.footer.defaultMessage: Stored only in this browser · bring your own API key · nothing saved on a server

app.manageLocked.defaultMessage: Manage needs the local app (file access) — unavailable online
app.manageLocked.description: Tooltip when the Manage tab is unavailable (no local backend)

app.moreControls.description: aria-label/title for the top-bar overflow button that reveals the secondary controls (providers, theme, links…) on narrow screens

app.nsfwProceed.defaultMessage: NSFW mode is on. Continue with {provider} anyway?
app.nsfwProceed.description: Soft confirm before using a safe-for-work-only provider while NSFW mode is on

app.skipToContent.description: Keyboard skip link shown when focused, jumps past the header to the main view

app.switchView.description: aria-label for the top-bar view switcher

app.tab.manage.desc.defaultMessage: Edit the building blocks and word lists on disk

app.tab.single.desc.defaultMessage: View one image up close — details, re-rolls, and resizes

blockEd.jsNote.defaultMessage: JS runs on reload — DPL and the rest hot-apply.

blockEd.nsfwDisabledTitle.defaultMessage: NSFW option only available in NSFW mode.

blockEd.nsfwFromNameTitle.defaultMessage: This name contains an nsfw token, so it is always NSFW.

blockEd.nsfwMarkTitle.defaultMessage: Mark this block as NSFW (gated behind adult mode).

blockEd.overrideTitle.defaultMessage: Copy this built-in block into your overlay so you can edit it safely — your copy wins and survives app updates; the original stays untouched.

blockEd.savedJs.defaultMessage: Saved — reload the app to run the changed JS.

dplIns.bullet.desc.defaultMessage: A bullet; a simple bullet defaults to a 50% chance.

dplIns.call.desc.defaultMessage: Call a generator or section by name (→ {token}).

dplIns.chance.hint.defaultMessage: Keep a line only some of the time.

dplIns.choose.hint.defaultMessage: Pick from a set of options.

dplIns.code.hint.defaultMessage: Inline JS, comments, and engine controls.

dplIns.comment.desc.defaultMessage: A note ignored by the engine (to end of line).

dplIns.deEmph.desc.defaultMessage: Less attention on the wrapped text. Stack [ for less; floors at the lowest level (never zero).

dplIns.emph.desc.defaultMessage: More attention on the wrapped text. Each extra ( adds a level (+10), capped at 5.

dplIns.emphStrong.desc.defaultMessage: Stack ( for more — (((text))) is the strongest. Renders as a weight (SD/MJ), braces (NovelAI), or an intensity word (plain).

dplIns.emphWeight.desc.defaultMessage: Set an explicit numeric weight (passed through as-is).

dplIns.emphasis.hint.defaultMessage: Nudge how strongly a phrase is weighted (the engine translates it for each AI).

dplIns.flow.hint.defaultMessage: Jump between sections and pull in other blocks.

dplIns.goback.desc.defaultMessage: Stop / return from the current section.

dplIns.heading.desc.defaultMessage: A named section you can jump to with “go to”.

dplIns.insert.desc.defaultMessage: Insert another generator or list by name.

dplIns.insertJs.desc.defaultMessage: Insert the output of a named JS block.

dplIns.nOf.desc.defaultMessage: Pick exactly N of the options.

dplIns.oneOf.desc.defaultMessage: Pick exactly one of the options.

dplIns.oneOfNothing.desc.defaultMessage: Pick one — but sometimes nothing at all.

dplIns.otherwise.desc.defaultMessage: Runs only when the chance just above it failed.

dplIns.pctChance.desc.defaultMessage: Custom probability the line is kept.

dplIns.rangeOf.desc.defaultMessage: Pick a random count between N and M.

dplIns.repeat.hint.defaultMessage: Render the same body several times.

dplIns.repeatN.desc.defaultMessage: Render the body exactly N times.

dplIns.repeatRange.desc.defaultMessage: Render the body a random N–M times.

dplIns.salt.desc.defaultMessage: Inject a random number to nudge the result.

dplIns.weight.desc.defaultMessage: Pin a line's order — a lower number sorts earlier, wherever you type it.

dplLint.frontMatterUnclosed.defaultMessage: Front matter opened with --- but never closed.

dplLint.goToMissing.defaultMessage: "go to {target}" — this block has no section named "{target}".

dplLint.inconsistentIndent.defaultMessage: Indented with {indent}, but the file started indenting with {started}.

dplLint.mixedIndent.defaultMessage: Mixed tabs and spaces in the indentation — use one or the other.

dplLint.unclosedOpen.defaultMessage: Unclosed {openBrace} — a {listTok} or {genTok} token must close on the same line.

dplRefine.appliedIssues.defaultMessage: {label} applied, but the result has {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} — review or Undo.

dplRefine.askCreateHint.defaultMessage: Describe a subject and let AI build a fresh starting template.

dplRefine.askModifyHint.defaultMessage: Type a change and the AI re-processes the current template.

dplRefine.complexLessHint.defaultMessage: Collapse choices and gates into fewer, clearer lines.

dplRefine.complexMoreHint.defaultMessage: Turn flat lines into choices, gates, and repeats so each roll differs.

dplRefine.createAria.defaultMessage: Describe the subject to draft a template

dplRefine.createPlaceholder.defaultMessage: e.g. a battle-worn space marine on a rain-soaked alien ruin at dusk

dplRefine.detailLessHint.defaultMessage: Strip filler and keep only the strong, essential fragments.

dplRefine.detailMoreHint.defaultMessage: Layer in more texture, material, lighting, and mood — mostly behind gates.

dplRefine.drafted.defaultMessage: Drafted a template — review, then Save.

dplRefine.empty.defaultMessage: The AI returned nothing — try again.

dplRefine.focusLessHint.defaultMessage: Add atmospheric garnish as [f<40%] lines for low-focus rolls.

dplRefine.focusMoreHint.defaultMessage: Keep only the essential subject; push fluff behind [f<40%].

dplRefine.intensityLessHint.defaultMessage: Add pared-back [i<25%] variants for a clean image when dialed down.

dplRefine.intensityMoreHint.defaultMessage: Add lavish [i>70%] variants for a richer image when dialed up.

dplRefine.modifiedIssues.defaultMessage: Change applied, but the result has {count, plural, one {# issue} other {# issues}} — review or Undo.

dplRefine.modifyAria.defaultMessage: Describe a change to this template

dplRefine.modifyPlaceholder.defaultMessage: e.g. make the armor ornate, swap the sword for a spear, add a stormy dusk sky

dplRefine.needContent.defaultMessage: Write or draft a template first, then refine it.

dplRefine.needInstruction.defaultMessage: Type a change to make first.

dplRefine.noKey.defaultMessage: No API key for {provider} — add it under Home → gear → Auto-fix.

dplRefine.pickProvider.defaultMessage: Pick a text (AI) provider first — Home → gear → Auto-fix.

dplRefine.tightenHint.defaultMessage: Fix indentation, tokens, and duplicates without changing the intent.

dplRefine.toolbarAsk.defaultMessage: Modify or draft a template with AI

dplRefine.varietyLessHint.defaultMessage: Fix the most variable choices so rolls look alike.

dplRefine.varietyMoreHint.defaultMessage: Add choices and '{salt}' so repeated generations differ.

dplStatus.errors.defaultMessage: {count, plural, one {# DPL error} other {# DPL errors}}

dplStatus.validWarn.defaultMessage: Valid DPL, {count, plural, one {# warning} other {# warnings}}

folderEd.deleteConfirm.defaultMessage: Delete the folder "{name}" and everything in it ({count, plural, one {# entry} other {# entries}})? This can't be undone.

folderEd.forceListTitle.defaultMessage: Keep this folder as its own sub-category even with a single list

folderEd.forcePrefixTitle.defaultMessage: Show this folder's path in the token (e.g. d/general)

gallery.emptySub.defaultMessage: Generate some images and they'll appear here, read straight from your output/ folder. (The gallery needs the local dev server — a static build has no folder to read.)

gallery.openAria.description: aria-label on a gallery thumbnail (label = the image's prompt)

gallery.selectAria.description: aria-label on a gallery thumbnail while in multi-select mode

gallery.selectedCount.defaultMessage: {count, plural, =0 {None selected} one {# selected} other {# selected}}

home.autoFixOff.defaultMessage: Pick a Text provider (header → Providers) to enable auto-fix

home.autoFixOn.defaultMessage: Auto-fix the prompt with {provider} before generating

home.closePalette.description: aria-label for the phone-only ✕ that closes the building-block drawer

home.composeModeAria.defaultMessage: Edit the prompt or the negative prompt

home.confirmClearAll.defaultMessage: Clear all results — delete their {count, plural, one {# image file} other {# image files}} from disk too?

home.confirmDeleteBatch.defaultMessage: Delete this batch's image files from disk too?

home.confirmDeleteImage.defaultMessage: Delete this image from disk too? OK = delete the file Cancel = just remove it from view

home.confirmDeletePromptImgs.defaultMessage: Delete all of this prompt's image files from disk too?

home.keywordOff.defaultMessage: Pick a Text provider (header → Providers) to enable keyword translate

home.keywordOn.defaultMessage: Keyword-translate the prompt with {provider} (use a clean tag list instead) before generating

home.nsfwProceed.defaultMessage: NSFW mode is on. Generate with {provider} anyway?

home.phNegative.defaultMessage: Negative prompt — what to keep out (DPL), e.g. blurry, lowres, '{#bad-anatomy}'

home.phPrompt.defaultMessage: Type a prompt, or use the building blocks on the left…

home.promptsPerRunTitle.defaultMessage: How many prompts to generate per run

home.rewriteNoKey.defaultMessage: Auto-rewrite is on but the rewrite provider has no API key (gear → Auto-fix).

home.shareInputAria.defaultMessage: Shareable link that restores these settings

linksMenu.downloadDesc.defaultMessage: Pre-built downloads for Windows, macOS, and Linux

linksMenu.localeAuto.description: Locale option that follows the browser's language

linksMenu.selfhostDesc.defaultMessage: Self-host the online edition or build from source

linksMenu.termsDesc.defaultMessage: The rules for using the app

listEd.addEntriesFirst.defaultMessage: Add a few entries first so the AI has something to learn from.

listEd.addedStatus.defaultMessage: Added {count, plural, one {# new entry} other {# new entries}}{dropped}. Review, then Save.

listEd.aiExpandTitle.defaultMessage: Use AI to add 25 new unique entries in the same style

listEd.droppedClause.defaultMessage: ({count, plural, one {# duplicate} other {# duplicates}} dropped)

listEd.noKey.defaultMessage: No API key for {provider} — add it under Home → gear → Auto-fix.

listEd.onlyDupes.defaultMessage: The AI returned only entries you already have — try again.

listEd.overrideTitle.defaultMessage: Copy this built-in list into your overlay so you can edit it safely — your copy wins and survives app updates; the original stays untouched.

listEd.pickProvider.defaultMessage: Pick a text (AI) provider first — Home → gear → Auto-fix.

listEd.removedDupes.defaultMessage: Removed {count, plural, one {# duplicate} other {# duplicates}}.

listEd.restoreConfirm.defaultMessage: Restore {name} to the default from the repo? This overwrites your local copy.

listEd.restoreTitle.defaultMessage: Fetch the default from the repo (master)

livePreview.live.description: Tooltip on the live-preview eye button

manage.backToList.description: Phone-only button that returns from the editor to the tree (master/detail)

manage.badgeForcePrefixTitle.defaultMessage: Force-prefix folder — its path shows in the token

manage.badgeGroupTitle.defaultMessage: Group folder — referencing it picks one random member

manage.deleteEntryConfirm.defaultMessage: Delete {label} ({root}/{path})? This removes the file from disk.

manage.detailEmpty.defaultMessage: Select a block, list, or folder on the left to inspect it. Editing arrives next.

manage.emptyUserRoot.defaultMessage: Nothing here yet — use + to add your own.

manage.entrySoon.defaultMessage: A full editor (with save + hot-apply) arrives next.

manage.folderSoon.defaultMessage: The folder settings editor (rename, priority, markers) arrives next.

manage.ghostTitle.defaultMessage: {path} — deleted locally; restore from the repo

manage.lockedBody.defaultMessage: The content manager edits the prompt files on your disk, so it needs the local app (the dev server or a local build). It isn’t available in the online version.

manage.overrideConfirm.defaultMessage: Create an editable copy of the built-in {label} in your overlay? Your copy takes priority and survives updates; the original stays untouched.

manage.yoursTag.description: Small badge marking the user's own content roots at the top of Manage

nsfw.confirmBody.defaultMessage: Enabling NSFW unlocks explicit adult words, artists, and generators in prompts and previews. Only continue if you are 18 or older and want to see this material.

nsfw.confirmNote.defaultMessage: Your choice is remembered in this browser. You can switch back to SFW anytime.

nsfw.feature.description: Feature noun phrase used in the online-locked tooltip

nsfw.titleOn.defaultMessage: Adult content is on — click to switch back to SFW

online.lockedHint.defaultMessage: {feature} is only available in the full desktop version.{why} Click to get it on GitHub.
online.lockedHint.description: Tooltip on a control disabled in the online demo build

promptResult.clearTitle.defaultMessage: Clear this prompt's images (asks about deleting from disk)

promptResult.dplTitle.defaultMessage: The DPL this was rolled from — click to copy

promptResult.genTitle.defaultMessage: Generate a batch of images for this prompt

promptResult.originalTitle.defaultMessage: Original prompt (before auto-fix) — click to copy {original}

providerBox.noSettings.defaultMessage: This provider has no extra settings.

providerGear.noTextSettings.defaultMessage: This text AI uses its built-in model — no extra settings here.

providerGear.noUpscaleSettings.defaultMessage: No separate upscale settings — this provider reuses its image settings above.

providerGear.none.defaultMessage: No provider selected — pick one in the Providers menu to see its settings.

providerPicker.keyBadge.description: Badge marking a provider that needs a bring-your-own API key

providerPicker.lockBadge.description: Badge on a provider only available in the full desktop version

providerPicker.softLock.defaultMessage: NSFW mode is on — {label} is a safe-for-work service
providerPicker.softLock.description: Neutral soft-lock tooltip (never says the user can't use it)

providerPicker.title.description: Tooltip on the provider dropdown trigger (label = Image/Text)

providersMenu.hintOff.defaultMessage: Pick a Text AI to enable auto-fix / keyword rewriting (toggled on the prompt box).

providersMenu.hintOn.defaultMessage: Text AI rewrites your prompt & keywords — turn it on per run with the wand / tag buttons on the prompt box.

providersMenu.reason.local.defaultMessage: It runs on your own machine.

providersMenu.reason.proxy.defaultMessage: This provider can't be called directly from a browser, so it isn't available online.

providersMenu.unsetDesc.defaultMessage: No text AI selected — prompt & keyword rewriting stays off.

providersMenu.upscaleHint.defaultMessage: Used in the single-image view to upscale a saved image. Pick a provider and add its key.

providersMenu.upscaleLockedReason.defaultMessage: Upscaling happens in the single-image view, which needs the full desktop app (it isn't available online).

settings.list.fullyRandom.description: Source-list option meaning draw from the whole dictionary

settings.seedHintPinned.defaultMessage: Pinned: every roll reuses this seed and reproduces the same prompt. Any text works — numbers, words, or a phrase.

settings.seedHintRandom.defaultMessage: A fresh random seed each roll — shown below so you can copy it.

single.aiUpscaleNone.defaultMessage: AI Upscale — no provider added yet

single.confirmReroll.defaultMessage: Re-roll from the DPL recipe? A new image is generated with a new seed.

single.confirmVary.defaultMessage: Make a variation from the {layer}? A new image is generated with a new seed.

single.convertLocked.defaultMessage: Converting needs ImageMagick installed — it isn't, so this is locked

single.copyJsonTitle.defaultMessage: Copy the full raw metadata as JSON

single.copyMdTitle.defaultMessage: Copy the prompt, negative, and details as a Markdown block

single.deriveLocked.defaultMessage: {provider} doesn't support seeds — re-roll & variations need seed control

single.layerMissing.defaultMessage: This image has no {layer} layer to vary from

single.noImageSub.defaultMessage: Generate an image or open one from the gallery and it'll show here in full.

single.noKey.defaultMessage: {provider} has no API key — add one on the Generate screen.

single.noKeywords.defaultMessage: The model returned no usable keywords.

single.noMeta.defaultMessage: No metadata sidecar was found for this image — it may pre-date sidecars or its .json file was removed.

single.openFull.defaultMessage: Open full image in a new tab

single.parentTitle.defaultMessage: Open the image this was made from

single.rebuildLocked.defaultMessage: Pick a Text provider (header → Providers) to rebuild keywords with AI

single.rebuildTitle.defaultMessage: Send the prompt to the AI, break it into a clean alphabetical keyword list, and save it over these

single.rerollTitle.defaultMessage: Re-roll the recipe — a fresh random prompt from the DPL, with a new seed

single.resizeLocked.defaultMessage: Resizing needs ImageMagick installed — it isn't, so this is locked

single.varyTitle.defaultMessage: Make a variation from this layer (new seed)

tokenPicker.filter.description: Placeholder for the token search box (count = number of tokens)

tokenPicker.more.description: Hint shown when results are truncated

update.available.description: Update banner headline; {version} is the new release number

update.copied.description: Confirmation shown briefly after copying the git command

update.copy.description: aria-label/title for the button that copies the git update command

update.dismiss.description: aria-label/title for the button that dismisses the update banner

update.download.description: Update banner button that opens the release download page

update.gitHint.description: Label before the copyable git update command

update.viewRelease.description: Update banner button that opens the release page (git edition)

wrapper.autoToggleLabel.defaultMessage: Allow used blocks to extend current wrapper

wrapper.autoToggleTitle.defaultMessage: When on, blocks may add their own Auto Begin / Auto End framing to the prompt. When off, only this wrapper frames it.

wrapper.footHint.defaultMessage: Wraps every generated prompt: start, your prompt, end.

wrapper.noSaved.defaultMessage: No saved wrappers — Manage presets to add one.

wrapper.revertEndDefault.defaultMessage: Reset End to the built-in default

wrapper.revertEndNormal.defaultMessage: Reset End to the default wrapper

wrapper.revertStartDefault.defaultMessage: Reset Start to the built-in default

wrapper.revertStartNormal.defaultMessage: Reset Start to the default wrapper

wrapper.startPlaceholder.defaultMessage: Rendered before the prompt — e.g. a style or framing lead-in

wrapper.triggerTitle.defaultMessage: Wrapper: {name} — frames every prompt with a start and end
